name: Maya Action: Set AOVs
description: Creates a Maya action that ensures a list of AOVs (arbitrary output variables / render passes) exists for the active renderer. Currently supports Arnold (mtoa) and Redshift. Provide AOV names comma-separated (e.g. 'diffuse,specular,N,P,Z'). Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    renderer = inputs.get('renderer') or self.get_parameter('renderer', 'arnold')
    aovs = inputs.get('aovs') or self.get_parameter('aovs', '')

    action = {
        'type': 'set_aovs',
        'renderer': renderer,
        'aovs': aovs
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added set_aovs action -> {renderer}: {aovs}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
